chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1438 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6908/2021 2. For hearing of main case 21-12-2021 Mr. Abdul Waheed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It appears that the controversy, as raised in this Petition, has already been decided by this Court vide order dated 03-11-2021 passed in C. P. No. D-1255 of 2019 and other connected matters, whereby the Petitions stand dismissed. Accordingly, instant Petition is also dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid order. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
